items.headline: City Council to study update to Health and Safety Element of General Plan
items.summary: The council is holding a study session on Tuesday, July 7 to review proposed updates to the Health and Safety Element of Cupertino's General Plan (2015–2040). This element addresses hazards, emergency preparedness, and public health policies that shape local land use and development standards.

items.headline: Venture Dock/Falcon X receives permit for signage at University Ave
items.summary: A business name change at 555 University Avenue is now cleared to proceed, with permits issued for two sets of non-illuminated wall signs for Venture Dock and Falcon X Global Innovation Partners. The companies will need new use and occupancy documentation to formalize the tenant change at this central commercial location.

items.headline: Four homes permitted in Comm Hill Phase 3.1 development
items.summary: Building permits issued for four single-family homes on Altino Boulevard as part of the Comm Hill development's Phase 3.1. The permits range from $413,712 to $512,234 per unit, suggesting a mix of floor plans in this neighborhood expansion.
